S.FORM: para' baq balay mkaraw ana luhi ru snat qu para' hiya'.
S.PHON: paraʔ βaq βalaj mkaraw ana luħi ru s~ɕnat qu paraʔ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: para' baq balay mkaraw ana luhi ru snat qu para' hiya'.
S.PHON: paraʔ βaq βalaj mkaraw ana luħi ru s~ɕnat qu paraʔ ħijaʔ.
